Course Levels

Beginner: Flight Explorer Intermediate: Flight Engineer Advanced: Flight Scientist
Advanced Level

Flight Scientist

Algorithm design, system integration, and cutting-edge applications

Requires C and Python programming skills.
Duration: 2-3 months.

Note: The complete English tutorial is being translated. For full content, please check the Chinese version.

Challenge Projects

  • A* Path Planning
  • Visual-Inertial Odometry (VIO)
  • Color-based Object Tracking
  • YOLO AI Object Detection
  • ESP-NOW MESH Network
  • Formation Flight
  • Autonomous Navigation
